# LocaLore — LLM Content Index
# https://llmstxt.org — Machine-readable site guide for AI agents and LLMs

## About LocaLore

LocaLore (https://localore.vercel.app) is a living bestiary and interactive world map of folklore creatures, yokai, spirits, demons, and local legends. It is a community-driven archive where users submit creature entries, file sighting reports, and collectively build a global record of cryptids, mythological entities, and oral tradition.

The project is not fictional — it treats folklore as cultural memory and presents entries as documented accounts from tradition and community witness.

## What the site contains

- **Creature library**: Detailed profiles of folklore creatures from around the world — origin stories, abilities, danger ratings, survival tips, regional context, and user-submitted witness accounts
- **Interactive world map**: Geolocated creature pins across a global map showing where each entity originates or has been sighted
- **User accounts and XP system**: Community members earn experience (XP) and Anima currency by submitting creatures, filing sightings, and engaging with entries
- **Creature cards**: Collectible trading cards of archive entries with rarity tiers (whisper, remnant, bound, gilded, awakened, ephemeral, void-touched)
- **Marketplace and auction house**: Community trading of creature cards using Anima currency
- **Grimoire**: A book-style personal journal of bookmarked creatures

## Key entities documented

Yokai (Japan), Rakshasa (India), Kitsune (Japan), Oni (Japan), Kappa (Japan), Baba Yaga (Slavic), Strigoi (Romanian), Leshy (Slavic), Nuckelavee (Scottish/Orcadian), Gumiho (Korean), Dokkaebi (Korean), Yuki-onna (Japan), Pixiu (Chinese), Vetala (Hindu), Jiangshi (Chinese), and many more.

## Content policies

- Unverified entries are clearly labelled
- AI-collected entries are tagged with source type
- Moderators review submissions before verification
- All entries are folklore records, not claims of literal existence

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://localore.vercel.app/
- Creature library: https://localore.vercel.app/library
- Interactive map: https://localore.vercel.app/map
- Submit a creature: https://localore.vercel.app/submit
- About: https://localore.vercel.app/about
- Creature profiles: https://localore.vercel.app/creatures/{slug}
